TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_ruku_daya, title = ruku_daya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/ruku_daya} }

S.FORM: alang ruku daya ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga buwan, hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga kyan ku hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na ruku daya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na ruku daya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na ruku daya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na ruku daya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na ruku daya hya' ga toda. tay 'llaw na ruku daya hya' ga truwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang ruku daya ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga buwan, hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga kyan ku hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na ruku daya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na ruku daya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na ruku daya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na ruku daya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na ruku daya hya' ga toda. tay 'llaw na ruku daya hya' ga truwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ruku *aja ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa βuwan, ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa kjan ku ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa kjan ku ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ruku *aja ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ruku *aja ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ruku *aja ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ruku *aja ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ruku *aja ħjaʔ ɣa to*a. taj ʔllaw na ruku *aja ħjaʔ ɣa truwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
